  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Auteur
    This class represents an author in the database It contains the author's ID, last name, and first name.
    AuteurAddForm
    This class represents a form for adding a new author.
    AuteurDAO
    This class is used to manage authors in the database.
    AuteurDeleteForm
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of an author.
    AuteurForm
    Abstract class representing a form for managing authors.
    AuteurGUI
    This class represents the GUI for managing authors.
    AuteurModifyForm
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing author.
    BaseFormFrame
    This abstract class serves as a base for all form frames in the application.
    ButtonComponent
    This class provides methods to create various types of buttons with different styles and functionalities.
    ConnexionDAO
    This class is used to manage the connection to the database.
    DatabaseTest
     
    DateLabelFormatter
    DateLabelFormatter is a custom formatter for JFormattedTextField that formats date values in the "yyyy-MM-dd" pattern.
    DynamicFormPanel
    This class represents a dynamic form panel that allows adding labeled fields dynamically.
    FormComponent
    This class is designed to simplify the creation of UI components for forms.
    GenerateResultFile
    This class generates a result file with the following information: - Number of users by year of birth - Average loan duration - Number of books containing a specific word in the title
    Genre
    This class represents a genre in the database.
    GenreAddForm
    This class represents a form for adding a new genre.
    GenreDAO
    This class is used to manage genres in the database.
    GenreDeleteForm
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a genre.
    GenreForm
    This abstract class serves as a base for genre-related forms in the application.
    GenreGUI
    This class represents the GUI for managing genres.
    GenreModifyForm
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing genre.
    ListComponent
    This class provides methods to create various UI components for displaying lists of users, loans, books, genres, and authors.
    Livre
    This class represents a book in the database.
    LivreAddForm
    This class represents a form for adding a new book to the library system.
    LivreDAO
    This class is used to manage books in the database.
    LivreDeleteForm
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a book.
    LivreForm
    This abstract class serves as a base for book-related forms in the application.
    LivreGUI
    This class represents the GUI for managing books.
    LivreModifyForm
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing book (Livre).
    LivreView
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a book.
    LogManager
    This class is responsible for managing the logging of the application.
    Main
    Main class for the Alexandria library management application.
    MainTest
     
    Pret
    This class represents a loan in the database.
    PretAddForm
    This class represents a form for adding a new loan (Pret).
    PretDAO
    This class is used to manage loans in the database.
    PretDeleteForm
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a loan (Pret).
    PretForm
    This abstract class serves as a base for loan-related forms in the application.
    PretGUI
    This class represents the GUI for managing loans (Pret).
    PretModifyForm
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing loan.
    PretView
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a loan.
    Usager
    This class represents a user in the database.
    UsagerAddForm
    This class represents a form for adding a new user (usager).
    UsagerDAO
    This class is used to manage the Usager (User) data in the database.
    UsagerDeleteForm
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of a user.
    UsagerForm
    This abstract class serves as a base for user-related forms in the application.
    UsagerGUI
    This class represents the GUI for managing users (Usagers).
    UsagerModifyForm
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing user.
    UsagerView
    This class represents a view for displaying the details of a user.
    UserByYearView
    This class represents a view for displaying the number of users by their birth year.
